channel.title: LLM Governance on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant
channel.description: Recent content in LLM Governance on Jonathan Nishikawa — SEO Consultant

item.title: The Ignition Key Paradox: Eliminating LLM 'Skimming' via Tokenized Runtime Governance
item.description: This engagement involved auditing a high-complexity Memory Gateway where documentation-only governance was failing. By re-engineering the boot sequence into a tokenized ‘Ignition Key’ and building a transaction-safe Memcore runtime, I eliminated the 50K-token ‘boot-squeeze’ and implemented forensic-grade write provenance.
